name: Roasted Pork Loin W/Dried Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Dust the inside of an oven cooking bag with flour.
3. Place the pork and the dried fruits in the bag.
4. Place the bag in a large, shallow roasting pan (the edges of the bag should not spill over the sides of the pan).
5. Sprinkle the brown sugar into the bag.
6. Pour in the wine.
7. Tie the bag securely.
8. Using a fork, puncture 4 holes spaced evenly across the top of the bag.
9. Roast for 1 1/2 hours or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 170°F.
10. Slit the bag open carefully to avoid getting burned by the escaping steam.
11. Place the meat on a serving platter.
12. Scatter the fruit around the roast.
13. Spoon the cooking glaze over the meat and fruit.
14. Serve.
